Home / Sponsorship Rate Calculator

Sponsorship Rate Calculator

Estimate what brands will pay to sponsor your content. Calculate CPM-based rates for podcasts, newsletters, YouTube, and blogs.

Scenarios:

How to Use This Tool

1
Enter your monthly downloads or listens for podcast/YouTube content.
2
Enter your email subscriber count for newsletter-based sponsorship value.
3
Enter your total social media followers across platforms.
4
Select your primary content type to apply the correct CPM rate.
5
Review the estimated per-placement, monthly, and annual sponsorship revenue.
6
Scroll down to compare how sponsorship income scales at different audience sizes.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is CPM in sponsorship?

CPM stands for Cost Per Mille (cost per thousand impressions). In sponsorship, it is the rate brands pay per 1,000 views, listens, or opens. Podcasts typically fetch $25-50 CPM for host-read ads. Newsletters command $30-60 CPM due to high engagement. YouTube runs $10-30 CPM via the platform or higher for direct sponsorships. Blogs generally earn $10-25 CPM through display ads or direct placements.

How do I increase my sponsorship rates?

Focus on engagement metrics, not just reach. A smaller but highly engaged audience commands higher CPMs. Track open rates for newsletters (30%+ is excellent), listen-through rates for podcasts (70%+ is strong), and comment-to-view ratios. Create a media kit with these metrics. Niche audiences in finance, tech, and B2B SaaS command 2-3x higher CPMs than general entertainment audiences.

Should I charge per episode or monthly retainer?

Monthly retainers are better for both parties. Brands get consistent exposure and you get predictable revenue. Structure it as 4 placements per month (weekly) with one bonus social post. Charge a premium for single-episode sponsorships (1.5x the per-episode rate) because brands are testing you out with no long-term commitment.

When do brands start approaching me?

Most brands consider sponsorship at 5,000+ subscribers or 10,000+ downloads per episode. However, micro-influencers with 1,000-5,000 highly engaged followers in a specific niche can attract niche brands willing to pay $100-500 per placement. Do not wait to be approached — create a simple media kit and pitch brands you already use and love.

How does this compare to ad network revenue?

Direct sponsorships pay 3-10x more than programmatic ads. YouTube AdSense pays roughly $2-5 CPM, while direct sponsorship deals on YouTube can fetch $15-30 CPM. Similarly, newsletter ad networks like Paved pay $15-25 CPM, while direct deals reach $40-60 CPM. Building direct brand relationships is always more profitable than relying on ad networks alone.

Example

🎙️ Sponsorship Rate Calculator

💰 Rate Estimate: ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ • Content Type: Newsletter • CPM: $40 / 1,000 impressions • Per Post Value: $900 • Bundle (4 posts): $3,600 • Monthly (4 posts): $3,600/mo • Annual Revenue: $43,200/yr ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 📐 CPM by Niche: • Podcast: $25 CPM (host-read ads, $18-50 range) • Newsletter: $40 CPM (high engagement, $30-60 range) • YouTube: $20 CPM (direct sponsorships, $15-30 range) • Blog: $15 CPM (display + direct, $10-25 range) • B2B SaaS / Finance niche: $50-80 CPM (premium verticals) • Lifestyle / General: $5-15 CPM (commodity) ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🩺 Rate Health: ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ • 🟢 Premium CPM — top-tier brand deals. • 🟡 Mid-tier — competitive CPM, 1-2 sponsor slots/yr typical. • 🟠 Small audience — engagement metrics matter more than reach. • 🟢 CPM $40 commands brand attention in this vertical. 🎯 Revenue at Scale: ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ • At 1,000 audience: $1,920/yr (entry) • At 10,000 audience: $19,200/yr (mid-tier) • At 100,000 audience: $192,000/yr (premium) • Current: $43,200/yr (30,000 audience) ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ⚖️ Per-Post vs Bundle Break-Even: ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ • Per-post only: $10,800/yr (1 post/mo, 12 placements) • 4-post bundle/mo: $43,200/yr (4x exposure) • Bundle premium: +300.0% revenue vs per-post • Break-even bundle size: need 4+ committed sponsors for retainer ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🔄 What-If Scenarios: ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ • Grow engagement 50%: Rate $900 → $1,350/post ($64,800/yr) • Raise CPM 25% (negotiate): Rate $900 → $1,125/post ($54,000/yr) • Longer bundle (8 posts/mo): Revenue $3,600 → $7,200/mo ($86,400/yr) • 2x audience growth: Revenue $43,200 → $86,400/yr • Switch to premium niche (B2B/finance): CPM $40 → $50 → $72,000/yr At 1,000 audience: $160/mo ($1,920/yr) as newsletter sponsor At 5,000 audience: $800/mo ($9,600/yr) as newsletter sponsor At 15,000 audience: $2,400/mo ($28,800/yr) as newsletter sponsor At 50,000 audience: $8,000/mo ($96,000/yr) as newsletter sponsor At 200,000 audience: $32,000/mo ($384,000/yr) as newsletter sponsor
